text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > LGBTQ2+ Social Clubs 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NEXT DOOR COLUMBIA GORGE PRIDE ALLIANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a safe and confidential space for all members of LGBTQIA2s+ to gain support and skills, socialize, and meet others by promoting equity and inclusion. Hosts Pride parades, youth outreach, community partnerships, networking and educational opportunities. 965 Tucker Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Age 16-20 LGBTQIA2S+ teen Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 386-6665 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRANSPONDER EVENTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mutual support meetings, social and special events. 440 Maxwell Road Eugene, OR 97404 Eligibility: Transgender and gender-diverse individuals and their allies Hours: Varies by event Email (541) 321-0872 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEXT DOOR COLUMBIA GORGE PRIDE ALLIANCE TRANSPONDER EVENTS
